title: dactylorhiza majalis
intro: Dactylorhiza majalis, also known as the autumn lady's tresses, is a species of orchid that is native to Europe, western Asia, and northwestern Africa. It is a terrestrial orchid with grass-like leaves and produces white or pale yellow flowers in the autumn season. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin infections, and digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Dactylorhiza majalis include infusions, tinctures, and dried extracts that can be used to promote overall health and well-being, with benefits including reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and enhanced immune function.
